About Samotics

Monitoring the assets no other system can reach.

Sensorless condition monitoring. From the electrical cabinet.

Founded in 2015 to solve a specific problem: 30 to 40% of critical rotating assets have no viable monitoring path. We built Electrical Signature Analysis from scratch to cover them. Today, SAM4 runs across 10,000+ assets on five continents.

Talk to Us See our timeline ↓
10,000+
assets monitored
90.8%
fault detection accuracy
80+
customers worldwide
5
continents
~100
people across 4 continents
Our Story

How SAM4 started

Started with vibration

Founded in Leiden to apply AI to industrial machine health. Built our own sensor hardware. Started with vibration — the established standard.

Switched to ESA

Vibration sensors need mounting on the machine. For submerged pumps, hazardous zones, and remote sites, that's not possible. We started developing Electrical Signature Analysis: reading machine health from the motor control cabinet, without touching the asset.

Became the market leader

Commercialised SAM4 and deployed across water utilities, chemical plants, and process industry. Today, Samotics is the market leader in ESA-based condition monitoring, with ABB as technology partner and customers across four continents.

Strategic Partnerships

Backed by companies that define industrial automation

ABB and the European Investment Bank back Samotics because ESA covers assets no other approach can reach. Their investment validates the technology at enterprise scale.

ABB

10% Equity Partnership

SAM4 ESA integrated into ABB's flagship ACS880 variable frequency drives. ABB account teams introduce Samotics to enterprise customers globally.

ABB partnership details →

European Investment Bank

€20M Financing

EIB backing signals technology maturity and commercial viability at the institutional level. Unlocking growth across Europe and beyond.

Interested in partnering? See our partner programme →

Leadership

Samotics leadership team

Jasper Hoogeweegen

co-CEO

Leads strategy and investor relations. Former CFO, CCO, and CSO at Coolblue. Started in strategy consulting at Bain.

Simon Jagers

co-CEO & Founder

Leads commercial growth and strategic partnerships. Former enterprise sales leadership at Dell, Oracle, and EMC.

Gerben Gooijers

CTO & Founder

Built the ESA detection engine and SAM4 hardware platform from scratch. Former Partner and CIO at Optiver.

Erik Gaarenstroom

COO

Runs operations, delivery, and customer success across five continents. Former consultant at Bain. INSEAD MBA.

Hans van den Heuvel

CFO

Manages finance, governance, and investor relations. Former Transaction Services at KPMG.

Thijs Bootsma

CPO

Leads product strategy, roadmap, and the SAM4 platform experience. Former consultant at Bain.

Advisors

Jeroen van der Veer

Former CEO of Royal Dutch Shell. Former Chairman of Philips. Strategic counsel on energy sector positioning and enterprise governance.

Dr. Johan Paulides

CEO of AE-Group. Former researcher in electric motor technology at Eindhoven University of Technology. Technical advisory on ESA signal physics and fault detection methodology.

Working at Samotics

Dutch. Direct. Collaborative.

The best ideas win here, regardless of who has them. We're about 100 people solving a hard technical problem: building the hardware, the AI, and the domain expertise to monitor equipment nobody else can reach.

Real problems, real impact

The code you write runs on 10,000+ assets across five continents. The hardware you design sits in motor control cabinets from the North Sea to the Australian outback. You see the result in production, not in a backlog.

Small enough to matter

At around 100 people, you're close to the decisions and close to the customers. Engineers talk to reliability teams. Data scientists visit sites. No layers between what you build and who it serves.

Supportive, not soft

Honest feedback. High standards. A team that has your back. The culture is fun and direct. We care about the work and about each other.

View Open Roles
